response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong alignment with the Staff Software Engineer role, particularly in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical leadership. His recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators is highly relevant, and his experience with high-throughput systems at Sociomantic and Altom Consulting further bolsters his candidacy. While gaps exist in operational ownership and stakeholder management at scale, his technical depth and adaptability make him a compelling candidate.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-driven engineering environments, including AI-agent infrastructure and code generation tools at re:cinq.
Deep expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures, evidenced by roles at Sociomantic and Altom Consulting.
Strong technical leadership and full-stack proficiency, with a track record of driving projects across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded).
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of operational ownership (e.g., on-call rotations, incident response) in recent roles.
Stakeholder management experience is implied but not clearly demonstrated at the scale required for this role.
Career gap (October 2025–present) and short tenure at re:cinq (6 months) may raise questions about long-term commitment.
